summary: All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI tests verified Admin Orders page loads, Re-fulfill buttons present with data-testid, and clicking Re-fulfill on paid order SF-2026-P7DXY successfully creates 5 download links. The critical indentation fix in status-check fulfillment path is working correctly - fulfillment loop now runs for ALL paid orders (not just legacy single-product transactions).
critical_code_review_comments: payment_routes.py lines 1739-1856: Status-check fulfillment loop is correctly DE-INDENTED - now runs for ALL paid orders with items array, not just legacy single-product transactions

payment_routes.py lines 1937-1975: Webhook endpoint POST /api/payments/webhook/stripe is registered and returns 400 (missing signature) when called without Stripe signature - proves endpoint is reachable
download_routes.py lines 206-212: Resend endpoint correctly returns 404 for missing links ('No download links exist for this order yet') and 429 for rate limit exceeded
AdminOrders.js line 398: Re-fulfill button correctly disabled when order.payment_status !== 'paid' OR actionLoading is active
AdminOrders.js line 401: Re-fulfill button has proper data-testid='refulfill-btn-{order_number}' for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Admin Orders page loads, Re-fulfill buttons work, toast shows success)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing paid order SF-2026-P7DXY
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fulfillment fix verified. Key behaviors: (1) Status-check fulfillment loop at lines 1739-1856 is de-indented and runs for ALL paid orders with items array. (2) Refulfill endpoint creates download links and grants audio access. (3) Resend endpoint returns 404 for missing links, 429 for rate limit. (4) Webhook endpoint is registered at POST /api/payments/webhook/stripe. (5) Admin Orders UI has Re-fulfill buttons with data-testid, disabled for non-paid orders. (6) No pending orders currently in system to test disabled state, but code logic is correct.

status_check_fulfillment_deindented.details: Fulfillment loop at lines 1739-1856 runs for ALL paid orders, not just legacy single-product transactions

refulfill_grants_audio_access.details: Audio access granted for Holiday products: series=['holiday'], lessons=['covenant','cradle','cross','comforter']

refulfill_marks_transaction.details: Transaction marked with download_links_generated=true after refulfill

refulfill_400_unpaid.details: Returns 400 for unpaid orders with message 'Order is not paid'

resend_404_missing_links.details: POST /api/downloads/resend-links returns 404 with 'No download links exist for this order yet' for orders without links

resend_429_rate_limit.details: Returns 429 when rate limit exceeded (when links DO exist)

webhook_endpoint_registered.details: POST /api/payments/webhook/stripe returns 400 (missing signature) - proves endpoint is registered and reachable

admin_orders_page_loads.details: Admin Orders page loads with 46 orders displayed

refulfill_button_disabled_unpaid.details: Code at line 398 correctly disables button when order.payment_status !== 'paid'. No pending orders in system to test UI, but logic is correct.

refulfill_button_loading_spinner.details: Button shows Loader2 spinner during processing (line 403)

refulfill_button_click_success.details: Clicking Re-fulfill on SF-2026-P7DXY shows toast: 'Fulfilled: 5 download link(s) created'

mocked_apis.none: All tests use live endpoints - no mocking. Stripe is live mode so cannot test real payment flow, but refulfill and status-check endpoints verified.
